abilities.description: Choose another player. That player gains control of target Treasure you control. You draw a card.

effect.description: Choose another player. That player gains control of target Treasure you control. You draw a card.
effect.name: ChoosePlayer

triggers.description: At the beginning of your upkeep, if an opponent controls more lands than you, create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.")
